Tell me your views on cheating during the exam.

I believe that cheating during an exam is morally wrong and undermines the integrity of the academic process. It's essential to uphold academic honesty, as it ensures that individuals earn their knowledge and skills honestly and are held accountable for their actions.
Elaborate your thoughts in a better way and more expandable way.

I understand the importance of academic integrity and the consequences of cheating. When we engage in dishonest behavior, we not only cheat ourselves but also the people around us who work hard to earn their qualifications honestly. It's crucial that we foster an environment where students feel encouraged to learn and grow without resorting to shortcuts. By promoting a culture of honesty and respect, we can create a more authentic and meaningful learning experience for everyone involved.
